# Black Knight Roofing — Veteran-Owned Roofing Company Serving Colorado's Front Range

Colorado's premier full-construction roofing company. Veteran-owned and operated, specializing in insurance claims, storm damage restoration, and lifetime-warranted roof replacements from Colorado Springs to Fort Collins.

GET FREE ROOF INSPECTION
REQUEST A QUOTE

---

## Trusted by Colorado homeowners
40+ Five-Star Google Reviews • BBB A+ Rating • 5.0 Facebook Rating • Licensed & Insured • Veteran-Owned • Lifetime Workmanship Warranty

---

## [01] ABOUT / WHO WE ARE
Black Knight Roofing Company is led by Adam Knight, a US Army veteran who founded the company to raise the standard in an industry known for shortcuts and confusion. Based in Denver, Colorado, we serve homeowners throughout the Front Range from Colorado Springs to Fort Collins.

### Veteran-Owned Excellence
Founded by US Army veteran Adam Knight, we bring military values of accountability, discipline, and integrity to every roofing project. We do the job right the first time, every time.

### Licensed General Contractor
Adam Knight is a licensed general contractor and President of Black Knight Homes. We're not just roofers—we bring a full-construction, builder-level mindset to every project.

### Patent-Holder & Innovator
Adam holds a patent for an advanced Snow Retention System, proving our commitment to innovation and solving real problems for Colorado homeowners.

---

## [02] SERVICES / WHAT WE DO
Complete roofing solutions for Colorado homes. From inspections to full replacements, storm damage restoration to insurance claims assistance—we handle it all with a lifetime workmanship warranty.

### Roofing Services
- **Roof Replacement**: Complete tear-off and replacement with premium materials. Asphalt shingles, metal roofing, stone-coated steel, tile, and flat roofing systems (TPO/EPDM).
- **Roof Repair**: Professional repairs for leaks, damaged shingles, flashing issues, and wind damage.
- **Roof Inspection**: Free comprehensive roof inspections for homeowners. We assess condition, check for storm damage, and provide honest recommendations.
- **Storm Damage Restoration**: Colorado hail and wind damage specialists. We document damage, work with insurance adjusters, and handle all paperwork.
- **Insurance Claims Assistance**: We specialize in navigating insurance claims after storm damage. This is a core specialty—we fight to get you what you deserve.

---

## [03] PROCESS / HOW WE WORK
Our straightforward 4-step process ensures you know exactly what to expect from first contact to final walkthrough.

### Step 1: Contact Our Team
Call (720) 804-0571 or fill out our online form. We'll schedule your free roof inspection at a time that works for you.

### Step 2: Free Roof Inspection
We assess your roof's condition, check for storm damage, and take detailed photos. Honest assessment with no pressure—we'll tell you exactly what you need.

---

## [04] SERVICE AREA / WHERE WE WORK
Based in Denver, Colorado, we proudly serve the entire Colorado Front Range region.
- **Metro Denver Area**: Denver, Aurora, Lakewood, Arvada, Westminster, Thornton, Centennial, Englewood
- **Northern Front Range**: Fort Collins, Loveland, Longmont, Boulder, Broomfield, Lafayette, Louisville
- **Southern Front Range**: Colorado Springs, Castle Rock, Parker, Highlands Ranch, Littleton, Lone Tree

---

## [09] ROOFING MATERIALS / WHAT WE RECOMMEND

### Asphalt Shingles (Most Popular)
Cost: $8,000-$15,000 typical residential roof
Best For: Budget-conscious homeowners, those planning to sell within 10-15 years.

### Metal Roofing (Premium Option)
Cost: $15,000-$30,000+ typical residential roof
Best For: Long-term homeowners, those wanting maximum durability, mountain homes.
